---
name: First-Time Contribution
about: For our first-time contributors!
labels: good first issue, first-timers-only
assignees: ''

---

**Hi! Welcome to our project!**
We love first-time contributors. If you're new to the project and want to help out, this is the place to start. Before you begin, please take a look at our [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidance on setting up the environment and our workflow.

**What are you looking to contribute?**
- [ ] Fixing a bug
- [ ] Adding a new feature
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Tests addition/improvement

**Tell us about your background (Optional)**
This helps us provide you with the right guidance and resources.

**What part of the project are you interested in?**
- [ ] Backend (Python/FastAPI)
- [ ] Frontend (React/TypeScript)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: [Please specify]

**Additional context**
Any extra information or questions you have before starting.
